name: BlackRock, Inc.
lede: BlackRock runs three centers across three Indian cities. Mumbai, Bengaluru and Gurugram, covering CoE and IT, built over 22 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one BlackRock office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: BlackRock, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: BlackRock runs 3 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Mumbai, Bengaluru, Gurugram), covering CoE and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: BlackRock's India footprint covers Mumbai, Bengaluru and Gurugram, spanning CoE and IT. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 94 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does BlackRock operate in India?
faq.a: BlackRock operates 3 active centers in India. Four are on record in total, including non-operational sites.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does BlackRock have centers in?
faq.a: BlackRock's India footprint includes Mumbai and 2 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does BlackRock run in India?
faq.a: BlackRock runs CoE and 1 additional center types centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at BlackRock's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for BlackRock's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads BlackRock's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at BlackRock's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
